outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump says ceasefire with Iran on 'massive life support' after rejecting Tehran's proposal
outlets.summary: Trump convened NSC Situation Room meeting and called Iran's counterproposal 'garbage.' Ceasefire declared to be on 'massive life support.' Resumed airstrikes discussed.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Iran war ceasefire grows increasingly shaky after Trump rejects Tehran's latest proposal
outlets.summary: Diplomatic deadlock deepens as Iran demands sovereignty over Hormuz and war reparations, conditions the US categorically rejects.

outlets.name: PBS NewsHour
outlets.headline: Iran war ceasefire grows increasingly shaky after Trump calls Tehran's proposal 'totally unacceptable'
outlets.summary: Detailed coverage of Trump's NSC meeting and the diplomatic deadlock, with analysis of what Iran's counterproposal means for prospects of a deal.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: Iran says it will 'never bow' as Trump rejects peace counteroffer, prolonging Middle East conflict
outlets.summary: Economic focus on oil price surge of 3%+ on ceasefire breakdown fears. OPEC at 36-year low. Hormuz Day 71 with no relief in sight.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: 'Totally Unacceptable': Trump Rejects Iran Reply — 'They Will Be Laughing No Longer'
outlets.summary: Supportive framing of Trump's hard line on Iran. Portrays Iran's counterproposal as bad-faith negotiating. Calls for resuming military pressure.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: US 'locked and loaded' for much higher strikes on Iran if talks fail; Trump pauses Hormuz ops
outlets.summary: Military options framing dominates. Fox personalities push to resume bombing campaign. Trump administration described as united behind pressure strategy.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump slams Iran's reply, Israel kills 2 medics in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Comprehensive liveblog covering Trump's rejection, Lebanon death toll (51 killed/24h), Hezbollah attacks, and Iran's mini-sub deployment in Hormuz.

outlets.name: France 24
outlets.headline: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire is on 'life support' / UK and France to host defence talks on Hormuz
outlets.summary: European perspective emphasizing UK-France Hormuz summit and diplomatic efforts to reopen shipping while Trump and Iran exchange hostile statements.

outlets.name: Time
outlets.headline: Trump Says Cease-Fire With Iran on 'Life Support' After Rejecting Tehran's Response
outlets.summary: Global analysis of diplomatic collapse, Netanyahu's 60 Minutes interview, and what renewed US military action would mean for the region.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire 'On Life-support' / Netanyahu: Iran War Not Over, Signals Indefinite Fighting with Hezbollah
outlets.summary: Israeli left-leaning Haaretz reports critically on Netanyahu's 60 Minutes interview vowing to remove Iranian uranium and his positioning on Hezbollah as a separate conflict.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Trump holds high-level security meeting on Iran, with renewed fighting reportedly on the table
outlets.summary: Liveblog covering Trump NSC meeting, Hezbollah attacks on northern Israel (1 killed Nahariya), and Israeli strikes on 30+ Lebanon locations killing 51.

outlets.name: CBS News / France 24
outlets.headline: Iran war 'not over,' uranium must be removed from Iran: Netanyahu
outlets.summary: Netanyahu's 60 Minutes interview signals continued Israeli military objectives regardless of any US-Iran deal framework.

outlets.name: Press TV / GlobalSecurity
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian: Talks with US not surrender, Iran defends national interests with 'resolute strength'
outlets.summary: Iranian state framing of negotiations: Iran's proposal is 'legitimate and not excessive'; US demands are 'unreasonable and one-sided.'

outlets.name: Al Jazeera (carrying Iran MFA position)
outlets.headline: Iran denies proposal sent to US contains 'excessive demands' — says US demands are unreasonable
outlets.summary: Iran's MFA defends counterproposal including Hormuz sovereignty and reparations as necessary preconditions, calls US position maximalist.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Iran: US peace talks proposal 'totally unacceptable' — Iran 'will never bow down'
outlets.summary: Iran parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf: forces 'ready to deliver a response to any aggression.' Iran says it is 'prepared for any option.'
